overall.description: A first-person perspective sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night, engaging in hand-to-hand combat with an NPC, falling into a water canal, swimming beneath a massive bridge structure, and emerging to continue along a waterfront promenade. The footage features heavy atmospheric rain, teal and magenta neon lighting, and futuristic megastructures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: approaching plaza edge where two individuals are interacting near the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through heavy rain on neon-lit streets, approaching two figures near the plaza edge

notable_agents.action: two individuals interacting near the waterfront railing, one wearing a distinctive yellow jacket

entered.detail: tall structure displaying rotating neon advertisements and corporate logos
futuristic high-rise building with illuminated windows and teal accent lighting
commercial structure with bright magenta and cyan neon signage
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting neon lights and street lamps
tall pole emitting cool teal light onto the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-drenched cyberpunk street at night, with the camera moving forward through heavy rainfall. Neon holographic advertisements glow against the dark sky, reflected in the wet pavement. The character approaches two NPCs standing near a plaza edge, with futuristic glass skyscrapers looming in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area with combat occurring near waterfront

events.description: engaging in hand-to-hand combat with the individual in the yellow jacket
defeating the opponent who then falls backward into the water canal

agents.ego_description: fighting the individual in the yellow jacket using melee attacks and blocks, moving dynamically around the plaza

notable_agents.action: aggressively fighting back, throwing punches and attempting to grapple

entered.detail: concrete seating with rain pooling on the surface
metal barrier separating the plaza from the water canal below
illuminated canopy providing minimal shelter from the rain

segments.scene_description: The character enters a plaza area and immediately engages in close-quarters combat with the individual in the yellow jacket. The fight takes place on wet concrete near the waterfront railing, with neon lights reflecting off the rain-soaked ground. After a brief exchange of blows, the opponent is knocked backward into the water canal below.

scene_state.functional_zone: water canal beneath massive overpass bridge

events.description: falling into the water canal, transitioning from plaza to underwater environment beneath the bridge
looking up from water level at illuminated mega-skyscrapers through the bridge structure, teal light reflecting on water surface

agents.ego_description: submerged in the canal water, floating and swimming beneath the bridge while observing the architecture above

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel bridge spanning overhead with support beams visible
dark water surface with ripples and reflections of neon lights from above
vertical concrete walls lining the water channel with metal railings on top
enormous skyscrapers visible from below, illuminated with countless windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Following the combat, the character falls into the water canal and enters a submerged environment beneath a massive bridge. The perspective shifts to show the underside of the bridge structure and the towering skyscrapers above, viewed from water level. Teal neon lights reflect off the rippling water surface as the character moves through the canal toward a set of stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with benches and tree-lined pathway

events.description: climbing out of the water onto concrete stairs, returning to street level
continuing along the waterfront path, approaching a distant pedestrian walking toward the camera

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water and walking along the rain-soaked waterfront promenade, passing benches and trees

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking along the pathway toward the camera, gradually getting closer

entered.detail: wet steps leading up from the water canal to the promenade level
paved walkway running alongside the water with reflective wet surfaces
empty metal and concrete bench facing the water
vertical light fixture emitting bright teal illumination along the pathway
tall trees with dense foliage lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the water onto concrete stairs and continues along a waterfront promenade lined with benches and trees. Neon path lights illuminate the rain-soaked walkway as the camera moves forward, approaching a distant pedestrian. The futuristic cityscape continues on the right with illuminated buildings, while the left side features landscaped trees and seating areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked neon street through a violent encounter and a submerged passage, finally emerging onto a quiet waterfront promenade. It begins by moving through heavy rainfall past glowing holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers toward a plaza edge. As the camera reaches the waterfront railing, the scene shifts into a close-quarters fight with an opponent in a yellow jacket, ending when the character plunges into the water canal below. The perspective then transitions to a submerged environment, gliding beneath the massive underside of a bridge where teal neon lights ripple across the water's surface. Finally, the camera ascends a set of concrete stairs to emerge onto a landscaped walkway lined with benches and trees, moving forward toward a distant pedestrian under the glow of futuristic city lights.
